---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the skill produces wrong, harmful, or misleading output
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Which file is the problem in?**
e.g. SKILL.md, references/move-framework.md, references/use-cases/research-phd.md

**What happened?**
Describe what the skill told Claude to do (or not do) that was wrong.

**What should have happened?**
What is the correct behavior?

**Source or evidence (if applicable)**
If this is a factual error in the research content, cite the source that contradicts it.

**Claude model and version**
e.g. Claude Sonnet 4.6
